query_normalized: exploring the convergence of iterated function systems with non-contractive maps mathematics
rationale: The paper focuses on abstract functional analysis of hyperbounded operators on $L^p$ spaces without explicitly addressing Iterated Function Systems (IFS) or dynamical systems, representing a distinct mathematical construct rather than a canonical reference for the specific IFS convergence question.
